description: Product Description Your Fitness Parter, Track Your Steps, Travel distance and Calories. Non-bluetooth LED pedometer watch, No smartphone or APP connection required. Advanced sensor precisely counts every step your child takes, encouraging them to set and achieve daily step goals. Multiple color options available This versatile watch comes in a variety of vibrant colors, perfectly suited for both boys and girls alike. Soft Skin-friendly Material Watch strap crafted with soft, Skin-friendly silicone materials, it ensures a comfortable wear all day long Integrated Watch Strap The integrated silicone strap makes it comfortable to wear without any sense of disconnection. Watch Buckle Effortlessly adjustable clasp, this watch is perfectly suited for the ever-growing needs of your chlid. Great gift for boys and girls This exquisite watch is the great gift choice for parents seeking to delight their little ones, as well as a thoughtful present among students looking to share a student friendship.
